title: Basic Rhythm & Rests
description: Learn the most common note durations: whole, half, quarter, and their corresponding rests.

sessions.title: Introduction to Rests
sessions.description: Learn what rests are and how they correspond to note durations.

sessions.title: Mixing Notes and Rests
sessions.description: Combine whole, half, and quarter notes with their rests.

levels.criteria: Can clap or tap basic rhythmic patterns.
